title: Airbus Ventures Backs Fourier in $18.5M Series A to Advance On-Demand H2 Production
content: Airbus Ventures announces its investment in Fourier â€“ emerging from stealth with its pioneering on-site, on-demand, hydrogen production systems â€“ as part of the companyâ€™s $18.5m in Series A funding. With this latest funding, the company will begin scaling manufacturing, accelerating commercial deployments, and expanding its engineering efforts to integrate its systems into critical energy infrastructure.
author: Analysts Account
